description: Composition Wine red printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a hooked chest placket, red tape detailing along the neck line, placket and cuffs of the short sleeves, and print along the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by geometric and traditional Indian print, and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The dominating print above the hem adds zing to this kurta. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
